name: Collapse: How Ukrainians Destroyed the Evil Empire
original_name: Колапс. Як українці зруйнували імперію зла
overview: This 7 episode documentary is about the collapse of the USSR and the part Ukrainians took in it. The series brings the Ukrainian perspective into the global narrative for the first time, along with recently unclassified details from the CIA and KGB archives.

trailers.title: Документальний серіал «Колапс. Як українці зруйнували імперію зла»
